verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was all alone, in the darkest of night You reached for me Pulled me into Your light There's nowhere to hide When there was no one else You whispered in my ear “Draw close to me, for I’m always near There's no need to fear”

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus there is none beside You Jesus there is no one like You All my life, All I want is To know You more Jesus there is none beside You Jesus there is no one like You All my life, All I want is To know You more (Jesus my Lord)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So I stand before You Give my whole life to You Jesus You are all I seek In You I find my perfect peace So I stand before You Give my whole life to You Jesus You are all I need Lord Your love has set me free
